race.description: Waldron's Fresh On River Iga Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: THEO'S CHOICE (16) ready to peak fourth-up with the winkers going on. Got out late with a sound fifth over 1300m at Wagga. Distance suits and no excuses today. HIGHLY INTRIGUED (3) back in grade first-up with a slashing win over 1300m at Swan Hill with the 60kg. Goes equally as well second-up and look for her to launch late. SO REGAL (9) improving mare who strips fitter after returning with a tough fourth over 1450m at Kilmore. Sticky map again and can take a hand in the finish. DOUBTFREE (13) unlucky not to have a few more wins on the CV and can return to form from the good barrier. Never in the contest when back in the field with a struggling eleventh over 1300m at Wagga. Best figures measure up nicely and has genuine winning claims.
